Injected fault: cable detached from switch in control x
Fault notes: One of the 8 switches modules is detatched from one of the corresponding cables. To make testing more challenging all the control module leds have been removed. Fastest way to diagnose is to use the power supply led to bisect-testing the control modules.
Possible Initial observations: The led on the power supply module is on
All the leds on the control modules are missing
The lamp does not turn on when a battery is inserted in the circuit and all the switches are in the on position

Fault notes: Leds are off from one control module onward, say control number 3 (included). However, in the first problematic control module, only the indicator itself has failed. The second problematic control module actually contains a switch failure. This induces the diagnoser to think that there is a switch failure in the first control module
Possible Initial observations: The lamp does not turn on when all the switches are in the on position (that is, they are closed)
The power supply led is on

All led are present on their seats on the control modules, however, only the first two are ON, the third led, and the subsequent control module leds are always OFF, irrespective of all the swith positions
